title: fermented vietnamese beetroot bun
description: a unique and healthy twist on traditional vietnamese cuisine, featuring fermented beetroot and coconut cream
instructions: combine beetroot and water in a saucepan, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes
allow beetroot to cool, then transfer to a fermentation vessel with a weight to keep it submerged
let the mixture ferment at room temperature for 1 day, then refrigerate until chilled
blend fermented beetroot with coconut cream, lime juice, and salt until smooth
divide mixture into 4 portions and shape into small patties
heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat
cook patties for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown and crispy
serve warm, garnished with chopped herbs and a drizzle of coconut cream
wrap each patty in a rice paper bun and serve immediately
